🎂

This day belongs to you.

Happy Birthday Ertiba 🎉

The story of us

Our Journey 💫

20 Feb 2026 · 1:07 AM
The Beginning
The moment our story quietly started. The universe must have been smiling that night ✨
A Realisation
The moment I realised I loved you
Maybe it was your texts — 'Good morning pineapple', 'Tham jaa laadle', 'Spam reels dumbfuck'. Somehow they all stayed with me.
Every Day Since
Choosing you, always
You have a way of turning ordinary moments into something magical 🌹
The Future
A journey with thousands of memories ahead and hopefully, many more beautiful moments together.

For the most wonderful person in my world…

E
R
T
I
B
A

✨ The most beautiful name in my world. ✨

Written from the heart

A Letter For You 💌

5 March 2026

My dearest Ertiba,

I know I owe you an apology. Leaving without giving you a proper explanation was unfair, and I am truly sorry if it hurt you. That was never my intention.

I am human, and like everyone else, I make mistakes. But what matters to me the most is being honest about them and asking for forgiveness with a sincere heart.

I have always prayed that somehow things could find their way back between us. If life gives us another chance, I promise to give my whole heart this time.

I understand that this may not be the right time or situation for you, and I will respect whatever you decide. But I wanted you to know how deeply I feel. If you return, this letter becomes a proposal. If not, then please accept it as a heartfelt apology.

Forever yours, Akash ❤️

A few reasons among many

Why I Love You 💕

🌟

You are one of the most genuine people I know.

🎵

U r beautiful by heart and by face also.

🤝

i want to share your ig feed.

🌙

You are always kind to me.

💬

You are understanding and emotionally mature.

🌺

Simply because you are you and that is more than enough.

Every second feels heavier

Since we stopped talking

❤️

This is how long I've been missing you

11days
11
Total Days
12
Hours
33
Minutes
23
Seconds

And yet, not a single day has passed where I didn’t think about you.

Make a wish

Birthday Wishes 🌠

Write a wish — watch it fly into the stars

I wish for endless joy ✨
I wish for adventures together 🌍
I wish for your happiness always 💕
💫

✨
🌟
💕
You are Beautiful ❤️

Happy Birthday, Ertiba 🌹
